name: IRC_IM_FEEDBK_RESP_DTLS
description: This table stores the average scores and ratings corresponding to feedback qustionnaire.

columns.Name: FEEDBK_RESP_DETAILS_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key for this table.System generated.

columns.Name: FEEDBACK_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the feedback ID for the job application. Foreign key to IRC_IM_FEEDBACKS table.

columns.Name: QUESTIONNAIRE_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the ID of the questionnaire for which the response details are stored. Foreign key to HRQ_QUESTIONNAIRES_B table.

columns.Name: QSTNR_VERSION_NUM
columns.Comments: Stores the version number of the questionnaire for which the response details are stored. Foreign key to HRQ_QUESTIONNAIRES_B table.

columns.Name: SUBMISSION_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the submission ID for which the feedback request is created. Foreign key to IRC_SUBMISSIONS table.

columns.Name: QSTNR_MAX_SCORE
columns.Comments: Stores the value of max score for a questionnaire based on the calculation rule.

columns.Name: RATING_RESPONSE_COUNT
columns.Comments: Stores number of rating responses per questionnaire.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
